## Type of Change

<!-- Check all that apply -->

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code restructure (no behaviour change)
- [ ] `test` — New or updated tests
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation only
- [ ] `ci` — CI/CD changes
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance

## Checklist

- [ ] My code passes `npm run validate` locally
- [ ] I added or updated tests for new logic
- [ ] I have not committed any secrets, API keys, or credentials
- [ ] I ran `npm run format:fix` to auto-format my code
- [ ] The CI checks all pass on this PR
